languages.text: "Тервантьяс сказал, что Нунциус — пустышка. Он не может коммуницировать и в нем нет никаких алгоритмов".
"Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."
languages.original_text: "Тервантьяс сказал, что Нунциус — пустышка. Он не может коммуницировать и в нем нет никаких алгоритмов".

traits.locale_text: "Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."
"Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."
"Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."

languages.text: «Tervantias dijo que Nuncius era un cascarón vacío, incapaz de comunicarse y carente de todo algoritmo».
languages.original_text: "Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."

traits.locale_text: «Tervantias dijo que Nuncius era un cascarón vacío, incapaz de comunicarse y carente de todo algoritmo».

languages.text: “特万提亚斯说过，努恩修斯只是一个空壳，无法交流，也没有任何算法。”
languages.original_text: "Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."

traits.locale_text: “特万提亚斯说过，努恩修斯只是一个空壳，无法交流，也没有任何算法。”

languages.text: « D'après Tervantias, Nuncius ne serait qu'une coquille vide. Incapable de communiquer, sans le moindre algorithme. »
languages.original_text: "Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."

traits.locale_text: « D'après Tervantias, Nuncius ne serait qu'une coquille vide. Incapable de communiquer, sans le moindre algorithme. »

languages.text: "Tervantias sagte, Nuncius wäre eine leere Hülle. Er ist angeblich nicht kommunikationsfähig und hat keine Algorithmen."
languages.original_text: "Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."

traits.locale_text: "Tervantias sagte, Nuncius wäre eine leere Hülle. Er ist angeblich nicht kommunikationsfähig und hat keine Algorithmen."

languages.text: "ターバンティアスは、ヌンシウスは空っぽの殻だと言った。コミュニケーションができず、アルゴリズムも欠如している。
languages.original_text: "Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."

languages.text: "Tervantias, Nuncius'un boş bir kabuk olduğunu söyledi. İletişim kuramıyormuş, algoritmadan yoksunmuş."
languages.original_text: "Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."

traits.locale_text: "Tervantias, Nuncius'un boş bir kabuk olduğunu söyledi. İletişim kuramıyormuş, algoritmadan yoksunmuş."
